text: The provisions of Section 26706 relating to windshield wipers shall not apply to implements of husbandry.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16. IMPLEMENTS OF HUSBANDRY [36000 - 36800]
### Chapter 5. Equipment of Implements of Husbandry [36500 - 36520]
##### § 36520

The provisions of Section 26706 relating to windshield wipers shall not apply to implements of husbandry.

*(Added by Stats. 1963, Ch. 2149.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of Section 26706 relating to windshield wipers shall not apply to implements of husbandry.
